translation.text:
When: Tuesday, September 2, 2025, until construction is complete
Where: Church Street from Wootten Way North to Ninth Line, City of Markham
Reason: Storm sewer construction
Routes affected: 411, 416 – Markham District School Specials

Detour
Route 411 morning service:
Morning service will detour northbound Ninth Line, westbound Highway 7, northbound Wooten Way North and back to regular routing on Parkway Avenue.

Routes 416 morning service:
Morning service will detour westbound Church Street, southbound Ninth Line, westbound Highway 7, northbound Wooten Way North and back to regular routing on Parkway Avenue.

Routes 411 and 416 afternoon service:
Afternoon service will follow the reverse routing.

Stops missed:
- 1548, 4711, 4723 and 5590 will be missed in the morning
- 5851, 1561 and 6155 will be missed in the afternoon

Alternate stop:
- Temporary stop on Church Street at Wootten Way North 

Please plan ahead and allow yourself extra travel time. For trip planning assistance, call the YRT Contact Centre at 1-866-668-3978.

When: Wednesday, July 2, 2025 until construction is complete
Where: Ninth Line and Church Street, City of Markham
Reason: Storm sewer construction
Routes affected: 522 - Markham Local

Westbound:
Buses will travel south on Ninth Line, passing Church Street, right onto westbound Highway 7, right onto northbound Markham Road and back to regular routing on Robinson Street.  Stops 4723, 5590 and 5326 will not be serviced.

Alternate stops:
Westbound:
- Stop 6561 on Ninth Line at Church Street
- Temporary stop on Markham Road and Dublin Street

Please plan ahead and allow yourself extra travel time. For trip planning assistance, call the YRT Contact Centre at 1-866-668-3978.
Delays on Rutherford Road between Creditstone Road/Melville Avenue and Greenock Drive

When: Thursday, November 27, 2025, until fall 2026
Where: Rutherford Road, over the CN Rail tracks
Why: Construction related to York Region’s Rutherford Road Improvements; expected completion in fall 2026.
Routes affected: Route 85 - Rutherford

Rutherford Road will be reduced to one lane in each direction between Creditstone Road/Melville Avenue and Greenock Drive to accommodate work on the rail bridge.

Expect delays for the duration of this project or until further notice.
For more information on the project, visit york.ca/RutherfordRoad

When: August 11, 2025, through Spring 2026
Where: Bayview Avenue and Steeles Avenue East
Why: Construction
Routes affected: Routes 91 - Bayview - Southbound

Detour:
Routes 91 will detour on Proctor Avenue, southbound Henderson Avenue and back to regular routing on westbound Steeles Avenue East.

Stops 5234, 2889, 3577, 3579 and 3581 will be missed.

Alternate stops:
- Stop 2888 on Bayview Avenue at Proctor Avenue
- Stop 3583 on Steeles Avenue East west of Henderson Avenue

Please plan ahead and allow yourself extra travel time. For trip planning assistance, call the YRT Contact Centre at 1-866-668-3978.

When: Tuesday, February 17 to August 28, 2026
Where: Yonge Street, between Holland Landing Road and Doane Road
Event: Construction
Routes affected: 52 - Holland Landing, 425 – Huron Heights School Special

Route 52 detour:
Northbound morning trips will service stop 2528 on Yonge Street at Mount Albert Road and turn right on eastbound Mount Albert Road. Northbound trips will turn left on Stonehill Boulevard, left on westbound Thompson Drive and service the temporary stop on Thompson Drive at Yonge Street. Detour will continue on Bradford Street, right on Olive Street, right on Dutch Settlers Court, and back to regular routing on northbound Yonge Street.

Stops 2541 and 2543 will be missed.

Southbound morning trips will follow regular routing to stop 2561 on Toll Road at Bradford Street, left on eastbound Bradford Street, service the temporary stop on Bradford Street at Olive Street, right on southbound Olive Street, continue on Queen Street, service the temporary stop on Queen Street at Yonge Street, continue eastbound on Mount Albert Road, and back to regular route to service Grist Mill Road.

Stops 2562 and 2523 will be missed.

Northbound afternoon trips will travel westbound on Mount Albert Road, service stop 2538 on Mount Albert Road at Stonehill Boulevard, right on northbound Stonehill Boulevard and left on westbound Thompson Drive.  Detour will continue on Bradford Street, right on Olive Street, right on Dutch Settlers Court and back to regular routing on northbound Yonge Street.

Stops 2541 and 2543 will be missed.

Southbound afternoon trips will follow regular routing to stop 2561 on Toll Road at Bradford Street, left on eastbound Bradford Street, service the temporary stop on Bradford Street at Olive Street, right on Olive Street, continue on Queen Street, service the temporary stop on the southwest corner of Queen Street and Yonge Street and back to regular routing on southbound Yonge Street.

Stops 2562 and 2523 will be missed.

Alternate stops:
Northbound

Stop 2528 on Yonge Street at Mount Albert Road, on the southeast corner
Stop 2538 on Mount Albert Road at Stonehill Boulevard, on the northeast corner
Temporary stop on Thompson Drive at Yonge Street on the northeast corner
Southbound

Temporary stop on Bradford Street at Olive Street
Temporary stop on Queen Street at Yonge Street
Route 425 detour:
Morning detour part 1:

Buses will service stop 2528 on northbound Yonge Street at Mount Albert Road, right on eastbound Mount Albert Road, left on northbound Stonehill Boulevard and left on westbound Thompson Drive. Detour will continue on Bradford Street, right on Olive Street, right on Dutch Settlers Court and back to regular routing on northbound Yonge Street.

Stops 2541 and 2543 will be missed.

Morning detour part 2:

Buses traveling eastbound on Bradford Street will service the temporary stop on Bradford Street at Olive Street, right on Olive Street, continue on Queen Street, service the temporary stop on Queen Street at Yonge Street and back to regular routing Mount Albert Road.

Stops 2562 and 2523 will be missed.

Afternoon buses will turn right on northbound Stonehill Boulevard, left on westbound Thompson Drive, continue on Bradford Street, right on Olive Street, right on Dutch Settlers Court and back to regular routing on northbound Yonge Street.

Stops 2539, 2540, 2541, 2543, 2562 and 2523 will be missed.

Alternate stops:
Morning trip

Temporary stop on Bradford Street at Olive Street
Temporary stop on Queen Street at Yonge Street
Afternoon trip

Stop 2528 on Yonge Street at Mount Albert Road on the southeast corner, at its regularly scheduled time
Temporary stop on Thompson Drive at Yonge Street on the northeast corner 

Please plan ahead and allow yourself extra travel time. For trip planning assistance, call the YRT Contact Centre at 1-866-668-3978.
Platform changes at Finch GO Bus Terminal due to construction

Platforms 1 to 12 at Finch GO Bus Terminal are currently closed until further notice for emergency hydro tower work.  All YRT routes will continue to service the terminal; however, your bus may be servicing a different platform during this time.

As a result of the construction, your bus may experience some delays as several routes may have to service the same platform. Real-time schedule information for buses servicing the terminal will not be available during this time.

Please plan ahead and allow yourself extra travel time whenever possible. For your safety, please use the pedestrian walkways and obey all road signage. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and appreciate your patience during this time.

For more details, visit yrt.ca
Detour - Hydro One Construction at Finch GO Bus Terminal

When: 
- Friday, April 3, from 3 p.m. to Saturday, April 4, at 6 a.m.
- Saturday, April 4, from 3 p.m. to Sunday, April 5, at 6 a.m.
Where: Finch GO Bus Terminal, City of Toronto
Reason: Hydro One Construction
Routes affected: 2 - Milliken, 5 - Clark, 77 - Highway 7, 88 - Bathurst, 91 - Bayview, 99 - Yonge, 98/99 - Yonge (late night), 360 - Vaughan Mills/Wonderland and Viva blue/blue B

Visit yrt.ca/ServiceAdvisory for full details.
